title: How to Use Crystals: Beginner's Guide (10 Ways to Start)
concept_focus: full_comparison_jewelry_view（完整四概念表第二处权威+首饰佩戴视角汇总10种用法；hub角色内链H1-H5专题）
full_concept_table_note: H6是完整四概念表的第二处权威呈现（H1外唯一），作为crystal care sequence图形化总览，内链H1文字版

ten_ways.title: Carry it in your pocket
ten_ways.desc: worry stone / tumbled stone — tactile anchor

ten_ways.title: Meditate with it
ten_ways.desc: hold / body layout / grid — link to H5

ten_ways.title: Use it in a grid
ten_ways.desc: arranged pattern for a focused intention

main_commercial.reason: The most-worn stone in any collection — a grounding touchstone bracelet for daily wear, needs regular cleansing
main_commercial.compliance_phrase: A popular choice for those who like a grounding touchstone during a busy workday

semantic_match.reason: Durable (Mohs 7), versatile, forgiving — the classic first crystal to learn care and uses on
semantic_match.compliance_phrase: A versatile piece collectors often describe as a neutral staple that pairs with any setting

entry_price.reason: The most common bracelet/necklace stone — worn as a daily reminder; needs no-contact cleansing (color fades in sun)
entry_price.compliance_phrase: A rose quartz bracelet many people wear as a daily reminder to be gentle with themselves

niche.reason: Kept by the bed as part of a wind-down ritual — a common first stone beyond jewelry
niche.compliance_phrase: A stone many keep on their nightstand as part of a wind-down ritual before bed

safety_warning.reason: Self-cleansing and used as a plate — the stone that helps you care for all the others
safety_warning.compliance_phrase: A self-cleansing stone many use as a display plate to rest other pieces on — a practical care choice

jewelry_scene.reason: Soft sheen suits pendants — worn at the heart center as a personal keepsake
jewelry_scene.compliance_phrase: A stone many choose for its soft iridescent sheen and connection to lunar ritual traditions

data_snapshot.cleansing_knowledge_version: v1.0 (H6汇总用，不深入方法细节——各方法细节在H1-H5专题)
data_snapshot.verified_by: 数据一致性 diff + 人工抽检

positions: M4-end-decision-card (主决策卡：用石前查耐受)
tool_cta.card_template:
> 💡 **Using a new stone? Check its tolerance first.**
> Before wearing, carrying, or placing a crystal, enter its name in the **[Crystal Cleansing Timer](/tools/crystal-cleansing-timer/)** →
> confirm its water/sun/salt safety so you care for it correctly from day one.

jewelry_angle.mode: central（H6首饰佩戴是核心视角，非穿插）

insertion_points.M3-way1-wear: 首饰佩戴核心：手链戴哪只手(traditionally非主导接收手)、项链吊坠位置、日常佩戴tips
insertion_points.M3-way5-nightstand: 首饰夜间放selenite plate——睡觉时被动cleanse/charge
insertion_points.M4-each-stone: 每颗石标首饰形态(bracelet/necklace/pendant) + 佩戴场景
insertion_points.M6-jewelry-summary: 首饰佩戴汇总：日常佩戴=mini reminder，月度selenite plate care

jewelry_angle.m6_role: central jewelry section（首饰佩戴视角是H6的核心差异化）

eastern_touch.wear: Eastern-inspired jewelry (藏式/编织绳手链，站点实卖)
eastern_touch.meditate: 瑜伽/藏传冥想传统 (link to H5)
eastern_touch.altar: 东方神龛/供桌传统 (personal sacred space)
eastern_touch.grid: Mandala 曼陀罗 (东方圆形神圣空间)

M1_quick_answer: 新手用石最简10法(首饰/口袋/桌面/冥想/床头/grid/房间/礼物/altar/care)
用石前查耐受：不是所有石能碰水/晒阳光/用盐——不确定先no-contact
进入10法前一句话'crystal care sequence: cleanse→charge→activate→program'
M2_order_hardware: 第一段(为什么用水晶): 体验/仪式/美感/日常提醒/收藏(非功效)
第二段(crystal care sequence): 完整四概念表(图形化呈现，H1外第二处权威)+内链H1文字版
第三段(首饰佩戴视角引入): 站点主营水晶首饰——10法以佩戴为起点
safety_first_narrative.compliance_phrasing: a daily reminder / a personal keepsake / a thoughtful collection (非功效)

howto_6_steps.name: Choose your first stone
howto_6_steps.text: 选一颗入门石(clear quartz/rose quartz/amethyst)——durability+forgiving

howto_6_steps.name: Check its tolerance
howto_6_steps.text: 查water/sun/salt耐受(用cleansing-timer工具)——决定能否碰水/晒阳光

howto_6_steps.name: Pick a way to use it
howto_6_steps.text: 从10法选(wear/carry/place/meditate/nightstand等)——建议新手从佩戴或床头开始

howto_6_steps.name: Care for it monthly
howto_6_steps.text: 月度care：selenite plate过夜cleanse/charge——full moon周期

schema.howto_name: How to Use Crystals: A Beginner's Guide

compliance.gentle_note: Using crystals is a personal practice rooted in spiritual traditions, symbolism, and mindfulness. There is no scientific evidence that crystals influence luck, health, or outcomes, but the practices — wearing a stone as a daily reminder, meditating with it, caring for it monthly — are genuine mindfulness rituals that many people find meaningful.

three_perspectives.style: 融在段落里（H6心理学权重略高：daily reminder/正念锚是真实mindfulness技术）

hero.scene: 水晶首饰+日常使用场景合集(手链/项链/床头石/桌面石)

jewelry_scene.scene: 手链/项链日常佩戴场景(Eastern-inspired)
